## 🌍 Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **OS** | e.g., Windows 11 / Ubuntu 22.04 / macOS 14 |
| **Python version** | e.g., 3.11.2 |
| **Node version** (if frontend) | e.g., 18.17.0 |
| **Execra version / Branch** | e.g., `main` or `v0.1.0` |
| **Docker used?** | Yes / No |
| **LLM Backend** | e.g., GPT-4o / Gemini 1.5 Pro |

## 📁 Affected Module (if known)

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] `core/perception/` (screen capture, camera, OCR)
- [ ] `core/intelligence/` (LLM, context, trust scorer, consequence sim)
- [ ] `core/digital/` (code tracer, error detector, task decomposer)
- [ ] `core/physical/` (YOLO detector, task recognizer, action validator)
- [ ] `core/hybrid/` (mode manager, action logger, guidance dispatcher)
- [ ] `api/` (FastAPI endpoints or WebSockets)
- [ ] `frontend/` (overlay or guidance panel)
